title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed with any Ollama model from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; use any model in Node or the browser.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; plug local Ollama models into LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama WebUI); ChatGPT-style interface that talks to your local models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; interact with Ollama models from JVM languages.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A more powerful interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with history & prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that connects to local Ollama via the REST API.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation pipeline using Ollama + Chroma for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot that forwards messages to your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-nvidia-rtx
summary: GitHub issue tracking native Windows GPU (NVIDIA/RTX) acceleration for Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and Docker Compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C#/.NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and streaming support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate for Ollama; async client with Tokio and streaming support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri (Rust+React).

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings local Ollama models into Slack channels via slash commands.
